calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Final Report
ORDER OF STATUS HEARING

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Final Report
Off Calendar Jun-02-2026 Continued To Jul-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Myron Greenberg (attorney) to appear on July 21, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear and for failure to file final report. Status on filing a final report is also continued to that date.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Final Report
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Continued To Jun-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Myron S. Greenberg for successor executor Peter E. Lippett (via Court Call).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Filing a Final Report and Order to Appear.

The Court addressed Mr. Greenberg's failure to appear at the February 10, 2026 hearing. Mr. Greenberg apologized and stated that he believed his client, who is also an attorney, had the necessary information and could handle the appearance.

The Court inquired about the status of the successor executor's final report. Mr. Greenberg reported that the estate is awaiting completion of brokerage transfers required to distribute securities. Mr. Greenberg estimated the transfers could be completed within one to two months but could not provide a definite timeline.

The Court continued the matter to June 2, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Court declined to impose sanctions for counsel's prior failure to appear.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Final Report
Off Calendar Feb-10-2026 Continued To Mar-10-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter E. Lippett, successor executor (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Filing a Final Report.

Mr. Lippett reported that outstanding tax returns had been completed and filed and that the estate was now ready to proceed toward distribution pursuant to the Court's prior order. The Court noted that attorney Myron S. Greenberg remained counsel of record but was not present, and that Mr. Lippett had been unable to reach him despite multiple attempts.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to March 10, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, stated that an Order to Appear shall issue to attorney Myron S. Greenberg, and advised that failure to appear may result in issuance of an Order to Show Cause regarding sanctions.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Final Report
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Continued To Feb-10-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Myron S. Greenberg for Peter E. Lippett, who was also present (via CourtCall).

The matter was called for hearing on 1) Status of Filing a Final Report; and 2) Order to Appear/Order to Show Cause.

Mr. Greenberg acknowledged his failure to appear on September 9, 2025, and apologized for missing the hearing. The court discharged the Order to Show Cause based on Mr. Greenberg's explanation and declined to impose sanctions.

Mr. Greenberg reported the original beneficiary of the estate had died, followed by her son. An accountant had been hired to assist with the preparation of outstanding tax returns for the decedents and the estate before any distribution could be made. Mr. Lippett stated that the estate was awaiting confirmation from the CPA regarding amounts owed but did not yet have a timeline for completion.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to February 10, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear (Re: Successor Executor Peter E. Lippett)
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Final Report
Off Calendar Sep-09-2025 Continued To Oct-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court noted that Myron Greenberg remained counsel of record as no substitution of attorney had been filed. The Court stated an Order to Appear shall be issued to attorney Myron Greenberg and successor executor Peter E. Lippett to appear on October 7, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

An Order to Show Cause shall also be issued to attorney Myron Greenberg as to why sanctions in the amount of $250 should not be imposed for their failure to appear.

The Court continued the matter to October 7, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Off Calendar Oct-08-2024 Continued To Nov-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Myron Greenberg appearing in person for Kristine Silva (Petitioner).

Mr. Greenberg stated that all the funds are deposited into a brokerage account, that his clients son is the sole beneficiary. First and final report for petition to decree of final distribution etc., taken under submission with the intent to grant the petition, except for the prayer #3.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Svahlin: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-25-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jul-20-2016 is admitted to probate. Kristine I. Silva is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jul-25-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
